name: project-conventions
title: Project Conventions
description: Shared project conventions, editor settings and agent instructions.

files.content:
<!-- BEGIN:nextjs-agent-rules -->
# This is NOT the Next.js you know

This version has breaking changes — APIs, conventions, and file structure may all differ from your training data. Read the relevant guide in `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` before writing any code. Heed deprecation notices.
<!-- END:nextjs-agent-rules -->

## Agent Rule Files

- Code structure: `docs/agent/code-structure.md`
- UI rules: `docs/agent/ui-rules.md`
- Environment and secrets: `docs/agent/environment-and-secrets.md`
- Validation: `docs/agent/validation.md`
- Git workflow: `docs/agent/git.md`
- MCP/tooling: `docs/agent/mcp.md`

# http://editorconfig.org root = true # Cấu hình chung cho TẤT CẢ các file [*] charset = utf-8 end_of_line = lf indent_style = space indent_size = 2 insert_final_newline = true trim_trailing_whitespace = true # Cấu hình riêng cho code React, JavaScript, TypeScript và cấu hình JSON [*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json}] indent_size = 2 # Cấu hình cho Style (CSS, SCSS, LESS) và HTML [*.{html,css,scss,less}] indent_size = 2 # Cấu hình riêng cho các file Markdown (.md) # Thường giữ lại khoảng trắng ở cuối dòng vì Markdown dùng nó để xuống hàng (
) [*.md] trim_trailing_whitespace = false

# Documentation Map

## Agent Rules

- `agent/code-structure.md` - feature-based code organization.
- `agent/ui-rules.md` - shadcn/ui, lucide, pnpm, and Vietnamese UI rules.
- `agent/environment-and-secrets.md` - Supabase and environment secret handling.
- `agent/validation.md` - validation level by change type.
- `agent/git.md` - branch, staging, commit, and validation rules.
- `agent/mcp.md` - MCP and shadcn tooling notes.

## Registry

- `registry-ship.md` - how to register components, blocks, pages, hooks, and utilities with `pnpm ship`.

Root `../AGENTS.md` is the short entrypoint that points to these files.
